title: Finally Trading Consistently…
author: ElephantOpening2346
selftext:
Been testing a chart workflow lately that gives trade ideas + explains the reasoning behind the setup.

Weirdly the biggest benefit hasn’t even been the entries themselves, it’s that I’m second guessing trades less because I actually understand what conditions I’m waiting for now.

Anyone else notice they trade more consistently once they stop treating setups randomly ?

comments.author: Ok_Airline9211
comments.body:
Would love to try this .
Can share the name.

comments.author: aevum-eu
comments.body: I would love to try it!!
